steps.title: Write the equation of line k
steps.content: Use slope-intercept form with slope $m = 5$ and $y$-intercept $b = -35$. This gives: $$y = 5x - 35$$

steps.title: Find the x-intercept by setting y = 0
steps.content:
At the $x$-intercept, $y = 0$. Substitute into the equation: $$0 = 5x - 35$$
Add 35 to both sides: $$5x = 35$$
Divide both sides by 5: $$x = 7$$
The $x$-coordinate of the $x$-intercept is 7.
